headline_judge: independent dynamic-MC macrostate basin first-hitting, full physics (workflow §1.3)
mainline_policy: ESP/ESD-GNN = ESDGNN(use_cdq=False); Guarded-CDQ2 is an optional extension arm only
compute_note: Full-physics training ~18-22s/step@N=120 (~linear in N); MC ~0.4s/trial@N=120 (~linear). The publication-grade ideal is hundreds of GPU-hours; every run is BOUNDED + explicitly labeled compute-limited (workflow §9.1); the harness is built to the full design.

evidence.canonical_path: train_with_curve uses the SAME run_consensus_episode + macrostate_metrics + macrostate_lagrangian + MacrostateDuals as train_macrostate, full physics (train==eval), with a persistent optimizer + held-out analytic validation hook (screening only; dynamic MC is the final judge).
evidence.regime: iid @N=120 is near-ceiling (analytic Pc~1.0 both GNN+distance, no headroom -- workflow §5.3); switched to mm_high(0.35,0.25) R_d=6 where distance analytic Pc=0.42, F_deadline=0.56, F_wrong=0.016 (room, deadline-dominated, reliability-safe).
evidence.bounded: 3 model seeds (headline target >=5), single training scale N=120, 50 steps, budgets {5,15,30,50} -- compute-limited; mixed-scale + >=5 seeds + structured-regime sweeps are follow-up passes.
evidence.result: FLAT budget curve: GNN macro_P_correct=0.422 at every budget = distance heuristic 0.423. Loss rises only via dual mu_d ascent (F_deadline=0.56 >> eps_d); primal does not move. Analytic peer-insensitivity: 5 structurally-different heuristics give identical analytic Pc across regimes (ceiling/floor/invariant, spread <=0.002).

evidence.finding: TRAINING-SIGNAL GAP (workflow §13.3), confirmed by the dynamic-MC judge. Under MC (full physics, 100x2 scenes, N=120) peer selection clearly matters: iid_easy distance 0.995 [0.972,0.999] vs load_balanced 0.920 [0.874,0.950] -> spread 0.075, CI-SEPARATED; mm_high_R6 distance 0.445 vs region_bridge 0.360 -> spread 0.085. But the analytic TRAINING surrogate gave all heuristics identical Pc (spread <=0.002). The mean-field analytic episode washes out the polling-pattern effect the subset-sampling MC resolves -> the GNN trained on the surrogate has no gradient toward what the judge rewards -> the EV1 flat curve. Distance is the best simple heuristic under MC; beating it via a learned policy cannot be reached through this surrogate.
evidence.verdict: STOP+REPORT (stop-condition #1/#2): trained ESP/ESD-GNN performance SUPERIORITY cannot be established with the current training signal. Honest contribution available now: the evaluator/diagnostic + the training-signal-gap finding + the §13.2 'stable learned constructor that matches strong heuristics' framing. Direction is the user's call.
evidence.namespace_clean: headroom_mc_results.json: forbidden=[] legacy=[]; macro blocks validated; manifest hash-bound (EV2-headroom-mc).

modules: src/optimization/mc_reinforce.py (batched_subset_log_prob + train_esp_reinforce, per-node credit + participation weighting)
src/validation/dynamic_mc.py (gated reinforce=True: differentiable per-(trial,node) sum log pi + per-node correct reward; judge default path unchanged)
tests: tests/optimization/test_mc_reinforce.py (5: log-prob vs reference + mask + normalised/differentiable; judge-invariant under reinforce; a step trains)

evidence.finding: GAP CLOSING via per-node-credit REINFORCE. mm_high(0.35,0.25) R_d=6 N=120, held-out MC 200x2 trials: GNN init Pc=0.370 (~uniform 0.368). Network-level REINFORCE (one reward/trial across all nodes) -> 0.370, delta +0.000 (gradient is MC sampling noise; the env-domination of EV2 as a credit-assignment problem). Per-node REINFORCE (each node credited by its own correct finalisation, omega-weighted, per-node baseline) -> 0.392, delta +0.022 toward distance 0.427 in 40 bounded steps. The variance reduction was the key.
evidence.honest_caveat: delta +0.022 is a real positive direction but NOT yet CI-separated at 400 eval trials (init [0.32,0.42] vs trained [0.34,0.44]); 1 model seed (compute-limited). Longer multi-seed confirmation needed to CI-separate + reach distance.
evidence.judge_integrity: the reinforce mode is gated; a test asserts reinforce=False/True give bit-identical basins; the 82-test MC/metrics regression is clean.

evidence.finding: GAP CLOSING CONFIRMED, reproducibly + monotonically. mm_high(0.35,0.25) R_d=6 N=120, held-out MC 200x2 trials: per-node-credit REINFORCE trains the GNN from init 0.370 (~uniform 0.368) to seed0 0.415 / seed1 0.405 (mean 0.410, +0.040) at 80 steps = ~96% of distance (0.427). Monotone in budget: 40 steps -> 0.392, 80 steps -> 0.410. The analytic surrogate AND network-level REINFORCE were flat here.
evidence.honest_caveat: NOT yet CI-separated: per-seed Wilson CIs overlap at 400 eval trials (init [0.324,0.418] vs trained [0.368,0.464]); +0.040 < eval CI +/-0.048. Evidence for closing rests on reproducibility (2 seeds) + monotonicity (in steps), not a single CI-separated comparison. 2 model seeds (headline target >=5): compute-limited.
evidence.verdict: G-ESP-MC-FAITHFUL-TRAINING core goal MET (a working MC-faithful trainer that closes the gap). Promoting to a CI-separated >=5-seed reaches/beats-distance headline + re-running budget/scale gates with MC-faithful checkpoints is substantial additional compute -> user investment decision (workflow 9.1).

EV6-a1-headline.campaign_phase: A1 (Campaign A, publication-grade; user chose A)
modules: src/evaluation/mc_faithful_campaign.py (train_mc_faithful + snapshots + ungated_cost + reliability_status + seed_level_bootstrap_ci + paired_seed_separation)
tests: tests/evaluation/test_mc_faithful_campaign.py (5: checkpoint round-trip+hash, snapshot==standalone-step-S, ungated-vs-reliability separation, seed-level separation, multi-seed aggregation)
EV6-a1-headline.pre_registration: A0 (committed cf163ea before any eval): un-gated J=1-P_correct; seed-level bootstrap headline (pooled-binomial demoted to diagnostic); reliability F_wrong/F_split UCB reported separately; >=5-seed headline; R_d(N)=round(6*sqrt(N/120)) calibration.

evidence.finding: GAP CI-SEPARATELY CLOSED at N=120. 5 MC-faithful seeds, held-out dynamic-MC (3 scenes; trained 300/scene, refs 1000/scene): trained macro_P_correct=0.410 seed-level-bootstrap CI [0.399,0.420], per-seed [0.421,0.421,0.418,0.396,0.392]. Paired-across-seed vs uniform 0.370: Delta=+0.040 CI [0.029,0.050] (CI-SEPARATED). vs distance 0.422 [0.404,0.439]: gap +0.012, CIs overlap -> MATCHES distance (77% of uniform->distance gap closed).
evidence.reliability_separate: all policies infeasible at eps_w=1e-3 (trained F_wrong 0.023 ucb 0.035; distance 0.018 ucb 0.023; uniform 0.035) -> J un-gated per A0. F_split=0.
evidence.verdict: section 13.2: MC-faithful REINFORCE -> stable learned ESP constructor that CI-separately beats uniform and matches distance at N=120. Superiority-vs-parity decided by the A3 scale sweep.
evidence.namespace_clean: phase_a1_eval_results.json: forbidden=[]; manifest hash-bound (A1-headline). Note: bare 'reliability' is a FORBIDDEN_BARE token -> key is reliability_status.

evidence.finding: Budget gate CLOSED under the MC-faithful trainer. Held-out dynamic-MC budget curve (N=120, 5 seeds, 2 scenes x 250 trials, seed-level bootstrap) RISES monotonically: init 0.383 [0.378,0.387] -> 40: 0.394 [0.386,0.402] -> 80: 0.401 [0.390,0.411] -> 150: 0.412 [0.397,0.425] (+0.029). DIRECT CONTRAST to the EV1 analytic-surrogate budget curve which was FLAT at 0.422 for every budget (the mean-field surrogate had no gradient toward what the MC judge rewards). Best checkpoint = step 150.
evidence.verdict: Resolves the EV1 STOP (the round's original blocker): under MC-faithful REINFORCE, longer training DOES improve the held-out MC macrostate. EV1 0.422 cited as contrast only (analytic, not an MC headline).

evidence.finding: section-13.2 PARITY holds across a 25x scale-up. shared-ESP (trained only at N=120) under fixed_protocol R_d=6: N=120 0.461 vs distance 0.463, N=336 0.429 vs 0.447, N=660 0.420 vs 0.420, N=3036 0.438 vs 0.4375 (uniform 0.415/0.380/0.370/0.3125). Across 6 non-degenerate cells (both modes): shared above distance 2 / parity 2 / below 2 (noise around equal), beats uniform 6/6. Scale-regret shared-vs-expert small (N=336: 0.008).
evidence.anomalies_surfaced: N=1248 (lone v=4 grid, deg 13.2) collapses to P_correct=0 (F_deadline->1) for ALL policies even at fixed_service R_d=19 -- a density/MAC-saturation outlier (fully connected, not a bug), EXCLUDED from the parity verdict. fixed_service ~= fixed_protocol at these N (MC first-hits before R_d). N=9840 = approximation bound (8 trials), never a validated N=10000 claim.
evidence.verdict: section-13.2: stable learned ESP constructor that CI-separately beats uniform and MATCHES distance, parity TRANSFERS across scale + both calibration modes. NOT 13.1 superiority (shared does not CI-separately pull ahead). Compute-limited: seeds 5/5/3/-/2; N>=660 reduced.

evidence.finding: 4 declared OOD cells (one axis varied, 5 seeds). Trained BEATS uniform CI-separated in ALL 4. Tracks distance within the matched-marginal family (corr->0.35: 0.361 vs 0.367; base_err->0.30: 0.479 vs 0.470; ->0.45: 0.016 vs 0.013). HONEST LIMIT: transfers poorly to the iid covariance family (0.149 vs distance 0.203) -- the policy learned mm_high correlated-error structure; structure-agnostic distance generalizes better across covariance families.
evidence.fix_note: plan cells corr=0.45/base_err=0.20 infeasible for matched_marginal -> feasible one-axis equivalents used (documented).

evidence.finding: Per-checkpoint zero-failure UCB (seed 0, M=4000). F_split CERTIFIED <= eps_s=1e-3 (zero split events -> UCB 0.00096). F_wrong NOT certifiable at eps_w=1e-3: trained 0.026 (UCB 0.031), distance 0.022 (UCB 0.027) -> the stressed mm_high regime is structurally infeasible at the strict wrong-basin target for ALL policies (regime property, not GNN failure -> why A0 un-gates J).

evidence.verdict: section-13.2 PARITY. MC-faithful REINFORCE yields a stable learned ESP constructor that CI-separately BEATS uniform (paired +0.040 [0.029,0.050]; 6/6 scale cells; 4/4 OOD cells) and MATCHES distance (gap +0.012 overlapping CIs; tracks across N=120->3036 both modes), with parity transferring across a 25x scale-up. NOT 13.1 superiority. Honest limits: iid-OOD transfer, N=1248 density collapse, regime infeasible at strict eps_w. All pre-registered (A0), namespace-clean, hash-bound.
evidence.round_status: COMPLETE -- all 8 ESP-scale-v2 gates green (EV6-EV11 + EV2/EV1 lineage).

contributes_to: post-round: can the GNN beat distance?

evidence.un_gated_finding: MC-judged free per-edge oracle CI-separately beats distance by +0.099 (CI [0.087,0.109]); both inits reach ~0.52; gain is reduced deadline misses (Fd ~0.55->0.42) converted ~3:1 to correct vs wrong, at ~2.5x distance's F_wrong.
evidence.reliability_finding: DECISIVE: reward=correct-lambda*wrong; at lambda=2 the oracle F_wrong matches distance (~0.023) and the P_correct gap COLLAPSES to -0.0067 (both scenes, statistically 0). Higher lambda strictly worse. The +0.10 un-gated win was reliability-bought.
evidence.corrected_verdict: ISO-RELIABILITY headroom over distance ~= 0 -> distance is the reliability-feasible per-edge Pareto optimum; section-13.2 parity is the HONEST CEILING at equal reliability, NOT a learning gap. Supersedes the optimistic un-gated read. Compute-limited: 2-3 scenes; per-scene oracle = upper bound; Wilson hw ~0.025.
evidence.judge_integrity: reinforce_wrong is gated; judge-invariant test still passes.

contributes_to: post-round: why is the GNN at parity?

evidence.finding: GNN-REACHABLE. Distilling the GNN to per-scene MC-oracle logits: in-sample corr 0.856 (hidden_dim 16) ~= 0.852 (64) -> NOT capacity-limited; held-out corr 0.857 ~= in-sample -> the fit generalises; pure geometric+region features suffice. Held-out MC: distilled GNN beats distance by +0.032 (captures ~45% of the un-gated oracle's +0.071) on unseen scenes. -> the original section-13.2 parity was a TRAINING/optimisation failure (REINFORCE stuck at the distance attractor), NOT a feature/capacity/generalisation limit.
evidence.critical_caveat: The +0.032 is the same un-gated, RELIABILITY-BOUGHT operating point as the oracle (EV12: iso-reliability headroom ~0; the distill eval measured P_correct only). So the GNN can beat distance on un-gated P_correct (trainer-fixable) but NOT at equal reliability.
evidence.combined_verdict: (a)+(b): model capability is not the bottleneck and the trainer is fixable, but a legitimate reliability-matched win over distance does not exist in this regime. Highest-value next: re-probe iso-reliability oracle headroom in a less deadline-dominated regime (larger R_d / lower N).

contributes_to: Route A: does relaxing the deadline open iso-reliability headroom?

evidence.finding: iso-reliability headroom over distance stays ~0 at every deadline budget: R_d=6 -0.007, R_d=10 -0.022, R_d=14 -0.022 (R_d=14 bit-identical to R_d=10). distance F_deadline INVARIANT at ~0.552 across R_d in {6,10,14} -> R_d was NEVER the binding constraint; the ~55% deadline misses are physics/MAC-limited (cannot form quorum), not epoch-limited. The un-gated oracle still beats distance ~+0.06 at every R_d but it is entirely reliability-bought.
evidence.verdict: NO legitimate iso-reliability P_correct headroom over distance, and relaxing the deadline does NOT open it. The less-deadline-dominated escape hatch is closed -- the limit is consensus physics, not the time budget. Parity is robust on the P_correct axis. Compute-limited: 2 scenes.
